creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to version 0.16.
- Do not use PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX since it is not a Python module.
- Remove default DISTNAME.
- Use Bourne Shell (/bin/sh) script instead of bash (also it was not listed in RUN_DEPENDS).
- Make PSYCHO an option instead of a knob.
- Respect NOPORTDOCS.
- Clean up.
